session log fragment with chat content about placeholders:
the {{KEY}} convention is just an example
{{ALPHA}} and {{ZETA}} are illustrative names
numbered: {{UNRESOLVED_1}} and {{UNRESOLVED_1216}}
compound: {{ARBITRARY_KEY}} {{ORG}} {{TOKEN}} {{HOST}}
JSON line: {"path":"{{KEY}}","escaped":"\\{\\{KEY\\}\\}"}
markdown code fence:
```
inside fence: {{KEY}} stays literal
```
adjacent: {{KEY}}{{HOME}}
trailing
